rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK A STATE CHARTERED BANK VS. RENKA PROP. LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Intention And Motion To Vacate Order Issuing Writ Of Possession Based On Attorney Mistake,
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 28, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT RENKA PROP LLC Notice Of Intention And Motion To Vacate Order Issuing Writ Of Possession Based On Attorney Mistake The Court considered the proposed opposition to the motion for issuance of a writ of possession. This opposition does not change the ruling on the motion for issuance of the writ and the motion is granted. Therefore, this motion to vacate based on attorney fault is granted and an order granting motion for issuance of writ of possession is granted nunc pro tunc to January 14, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: UMPQUA BANK A STATE CHARTERED BANK VS. RENKA PROP. LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have The April 6 2018 Receiver Order And October 12,2018 Sale Orders Declared Null And Void
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for March 28, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT RENKA PROP LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Have The April 6 2018 Receiver Order And October 12,2018 Sale Orders Declared Null And Void DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the propositions that the orders are null and void. Additionally, no authority is cited for the proposition that the chosen procedure for challenging these orders is proper. = (501/CFH)
